editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=4 of 228 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
RoB 2.0: 0 high-risk + 1 some-concerns domains; add low-RoB sensitivity analysis.
Pooled -11.84 diverges from Lincoff 2023 benchmark (HR 0.80 [0.72, 0.90]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
